provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, stocky human male in his 40s with missing fingers on his left hand and a permanent grease stain around his eyes from welding goggles, wearing a Compact engineering coverall that has been cut apart and reassembled with Veshan leather patches at the elbows and knees, a homemade tool belt made from ship cable, stolen Compact boots with the soles re-glued, reactor warning patches still visible on the coverall from whatever ship it was taken from
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
